message:
Rustfmt pass + distributed message size limits + kill_on_drop fixes

This is predominantly a cargo fmt pass across the entire workspace
(~95% of the 12,850 insertions / 11,083 deletions), with a handful
of substantive fixes buried within.

Substantive changes:

crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs — Distributed message size limits:
- Add max_bytes parameter to distributed_read_line() with enforcement,
  rejecting oversized messages with a MessageTooLarge error to prevent
  DoS via unbounded line reads during distributed protocol exchanges.
- New helpers: distributed_message_too_large_io_error(),
  distributed_is_message_too_large_io_error(),
  distributed_replay_session_key().
- All three call sites (handshake, message loop, agent stream) now pass
  MAX_MESSAGE_SIZE and handle the too-large error with security events.

crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs — Mutex-hold-duration fix:
- record_ipc_rpc_audit(): Clone StorageHandle under mutex then drop lock
  before async I/O, preventing holding mutex across await points.
- run_single_scheduled_backup(): Same pattern for checkpoint call.

crates/frankenterm-core/src/cass.rs, caut.rs — kill_on_drop:
- Add cmd.kill_on_drop(true) to async Command instances to prevent
  zombie child processes when the parent task is cancelled/dropped.

crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs — Test framework migration:
- Two distributed integration tests changed from #[tokio::test] to
  #[test] with explicit RuntimeBuilder::current_thread().block_on()
  for runtime compatibility.
- Mission lifecycle test updated to align with renamed state machine
  transitions (AwaitingApproval → approve → executing).

Formatting changes (bulk):
- Re-indentation of async test bodies inside run_async_test closures
  across export.rs, recorder_storage.rs, tantivy_reindex.rs,
  simulation.rs, workflows/mod.rs, and ~50 test files.
- Standard rustfmt line-wrapping: breaking long lines, collapsing short
  single-field struct variants, expanding inline if/else.
- Alphabetical reordering of use imports and mod declarations in lib.rs,
  main.rs, and gui crate files.
- Trailing whitespace and blank line cleanup.
- Beads issue timestamp update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
